# Parerga and Paralipomena

*[Schopenhauer](../philosophers/schopenhauer.md) · 1851 · *Parerga und Paralipomena**

A collection of essays and remarks, "appendices" and "leftovers" alongside the system, including the Aphorisms on the Wisdom of Life. It was this book, of limpid and biting prose, that finally brought its author fame late in his life.
